name: harness-korean
description: Team-architecture factory for Claude Code + Korean persona injection (Nemotron-Personas-Korea). Fork of revfactory/harness that adds 3 Korean-flavored skills (korean-persona-search, korean-voice-adapter, korean-persona-harness). Designed to coexist with upstream — install both at the same time. 본가 + 한국어 퍼소나 합성 100만 행 기반 한국 직장인 캐릭터 자동 주입.
